wifi.notes: 2.4GHz and 5GHz share the same name; either is fine.

monitor.instructions: The laptop dock cable is the single USB-C on the left. Plug it in and the monitor switches automatically. If it stays black, press the joystick on the back-right and pick 'USB-C'.

desk.instructions: Use the up/down buttons on the controller under the desktop, right side. Presets 1 and 2 are sitting/standing heights.

keyboard_mouse.model: Logitech MX Keys Mini + MX Master mouse
keyboard_mouse.instructions: Both are already paired to the dock. If they don't respond, press the Bluetooth channel button (1) on each, then flip the power switch off/on.

sonos.instructions: Open the Sonos app and join the household, or AirPlay/Spotify Connect to 'Basement Office'. No password needed on the local network.

home_assistant.instructions: Open the URL on the WiFi above. The 'Basement Office' dashboard has the light toggles and scenes.
